result.text: Scan: a recovery vessel — a tow truck, running empty. It is {pick:hunting|patrolling|between rescues}. Its hook sways with purpose. Hail it respectfully, or track its patrol?

moveon.text: The vessel drifts out of optimal range. Its secrets remain its own. For now.

hail.text: The operator responds: {n:15-40} years of rescues, and one great white whale — a legendary breakdown they never reached in time. Do we ask about the whale?

whale.text: The story: a '73 wagon, a mountain pass, a snowstorm. They still drive that pass sometimes. Some rescues stay with you, Captain. We salute the long-haulers of the road.

well.text: Well-wishes transmitted. The operator tipped an imaginary cap. May their hook stay empty and their coffee stay warm.

track.text: Patrol tracked: a slow loop of the interstate's troubled miles. A shepherd counting sheep that haven't strayed yet. Oddly moving, Captain.
